title: Web3 Wallet Connect for Digital Sellers Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a Nigerian digital creator trying to sell an ebook online without PayPal's restrictions, you're not alone. PayPal's limitations on transactions from your country have left you wondering how to monetize your digital products. You're not alone in Ghana, Kenya, or Pakistan either, where similar restrictions apply. You've probably tried Gumroad, Payhip, or Stripe, only to hit a paywall due to KYC requirements or geographic restrictions. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in – a platform offering a Full Stack Bundle to bypass these limitations and start selling your ebooks, courses, and digital products instantly.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is a frontend wallet integration that allows buyers to purchase digital products using cryptocurrency. What this means is that you can create a seamless buying experience for your customers, regardless of their location or banking restrictions. The technology underpinning this is blockchain-based, ensuring secure, fast, and low-cost transactions. This is particularly useful for creators in restricted countries, where conventional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are often inaccessible.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

When a customer makes a purchase using Web3 Wallet Connect, the transaction is initiated through a multi-chain QR code that's linked to the buyer's cryptocurrency wallet. The transaction is then processed through NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. The payment processor's robust infrastructure ensures that the transaction is secure, fast, and irreversible. Once the payment is confirmed, the digital product is automatically delivered to the buyer via Unchained Commerce's Core Engine, without any human intervention.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed specifically for digital creators who are struggling to monetize their products due to geographic restrictions or KYC requirements. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, or software, this technology provides a safe and reliable way to receive payments from customers worldwide. By using Web3 Wallet Connect, you can tap into a global market, increase your sales, and grow your business without the constraints of traditional payment processors.
Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect enables secure, fast, and low-cost transactions for digital product sales worldwide.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle includes three key components: Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard. The Core Engine is a backend infrastructure that automates the delivery of digital products, ensuring that customers receive their purchases instantly. Wallet Connect is the frontend integration that enables customers to make purchases using cryptocurrency, while the Dashboard provides real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management for creators. When combined, these components create a seamless and secure buying experience that benefits both creators and customers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, follow these steps: sign up for a Full Stack Bundle account, configure your Core Engine and Wallet Connect settings, and create a dashboard to track your sales and analytics. Next, integrate your digital products with the Core Engine and configure your payment processor settings. Finally, promote your store and products to attract customers. With Unchained Commerce, you can start selling your digital products instantly, without the need for PayPal or other restricted payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell templates and fonts without using Gumroad or Payhip? Absolutely. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect allows you to sell digital products using cryptocurrency, bypassing the limitations of traditional payment processors. With our platform, you can create a seamless buying experience for your customers, regardless of their location or banking restrictions.
By using Web3 Wallet Connect, you can bypass PayPal's restrictions and tap into a global market for digital products.
